tests.scenario: Save a mood check in with timestamp
steps: Open the mood check in screen
tests.expected_result: The system saves the mood entry and shows the selected mood with the date and time of submission.

tests.scenario: Complete a mood check in in one session
steps: Open the mood check in screen
Submit the entry without leaving the screen
tests.expected_result: The entry is saved successfully in one session and appears in the user record.

tests.scenario: Add a journal note to a mood entry
steps: Open the mood check in screen
tests.expected_result: The system saves the mood entry together with the written journal note.

tests.scenario: Save a mood entry with a longer written note
steps: Open the mood check in screen
Enter a multi sentence journal note
tests.expected_result: The saved entry includes the full journal note that was entered before submission.

tests.scenario: View mood history in date order
steps: Save at least two mood entries on different dates
tests.expected_result: The system shows the saved entries in chronological order.

tests.scenario: View journal notes in entry history
steps: Save at least two mood entries with written notes
tests.expected_result: Each displayed history item includes its associated journal note.

tests.scenario: Generate a summary for a selected date range
steps: Save mood entries across multiple days
Select a start date and end date
tests.expected_result: The system shows a summary based only on entries recorded within the selected date range.

tests.scenario: Exclude entries outside the selected date range
steps: Save mood entries before, within, and after a test date range
tests.expected_result: The summary includes only entries inside the selected range and excludes entries outside it.

tests.scenario: Review past entries before an appointment
steps: Save multiple mood entries with notes
tests.expected_result: The system displays past entries in one readable view for appointment preparation.

tests.scenario: Show dates moods and notes together in review view
tests.expected_result: Each entry in the review screen shows the date, the mood, and the written note together.

tests.scenario: Label premium features before access
steps: Open a screen that lists app features
tests.expected_result: Any premium feature is clearly marked as premium before the user tries to open it.

tests.scenario: Do not mark free features as premium
steps: Open a screen that lists both free and premium features
tests.expected_result: Free features appear without a premium restriction label while premium features remain labeled.

tests.scenario: Show subscription price before purchase confirmation
tests.expected_result: The purchase screen shows the subscription price before the user confirms payment.

tests.scenario: Show billing period before purchase confirmation
tests.expected_result: The purchase screen shows the billing period and a confirmation action before payment is submitted.

tests.scenario: Generate a mood insights report from user data
steps: Save multiple mood entries over time
tests.expected_result: The system displays an insights report based on the user’s recorded entries.

tests.scenario: Do not show generic placeholder text in insights report
steps: Save multiple mood entries over time
tests.expected_result: The report content reflects the user’s stored mood history instead of only generic placeholder text.

tests.scenario: Provide feedback based on recorded mood patterns
steps: Save at least seven mood entries
tests.expected_result: The system provides feedback that refers to patterns found in the saved mood history.

tests.scenario: Use mood history when generating feedback
steps: Save at least seven mood entries with different moods
tests.expected_result: The feedback reflects the user’s recorded mood history rather than showing unrelated generic advice only.

tests.scenario: Save preferred reminder times
steps: Select one or more reminder times
tests.expected_result: The system stores the selected reminder times successfully.

tests.scenario: Display saved reminder times in settings
steps: Select one or more reminder times
tests.expected_result: The previously selected reminder times are shown in the reminder settings screen.

tests.scenario: Send a reminder at a saved time
steps: Save a reminder time a few minutes ahead
Wait until the saved time is reached
tests.expected_result: The system sends a mood check in notification at the saved reminder time.

tests.scenario: Send reminders only when enabled
steps: Wait until the saved reminder time is reached
tests.expected_result: A notification is sent because reminders are enabled and a valid reminder time was saved.

tests.scenario: Keep saved reminder times after turning reminders off and on
steps: Save one or more reminder times
tests.expected_result: The system still shows the previously saved reminder times after reminders are turned back on.

tests.scenario: Do not delete reminder times when disabling reminders
steps: Save one or more reminder times
tests.expected_result: Turning reminders off does not delete the saved reminder times.
